notes:
What was tested (options not combined together):
PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1
PROTON_NO_D3D11=1
PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1
PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=1

What doesn't work:
the game boots up a loading screen, but after a brief animation it crashes immediately
title: League of Evil

notes:
As long as I ran it in windowed mode, all goes fine.. But when going fullscreen, screen goes black, ..and you know how the saying goes. Otherwise the game and controls seem to be going on, tho' -But the only way to fix it, is to surgically remove all user-config files for the game, or do a _clean_ install of it.
 Also, when changing from 4:3 aspect ratio to 16:9, the screen goes the same shade of black, but luckily restarting the game fixes that. 

Same diagnosis for; both 3.16.* and 4.2.3
title: League of Evil
